items.summary: Fix the PhonePe QR code click handler on the OrderForm page to correctly open the PhonePe mobile application using the proper deep link URL format (phonepe://) that works on mobile devices

Add real-time total amount calculation on the OrderForm page that dynamically multiplies the selected product price (Milk: ₹60/Litre, Paneer: ₹400/Kg, Ghee: ₹1500/Kg) by the entered quantity value and displays the calculated total amount prominently above the submit button
Display the delivery date field on the DeliverySchedule page for each order, showing when that specific order is scheduled for delivery with proper date formatting
Implement SMS notification functionality that automatically sends an order confirmation message to the customer's mobile phone number when an order is successfully placed through the OrderForm
